options: [{"text":"The length is 3 because 4 groups of 2/3 make 8/3, and half of 2/3 is 1/3, so 8/3 + 1/3 = 9/3.","correct":true},{"text":"The length is 3 1/6 because half of 2/3 is 1/2, so add 8/3 + 1/2.","correct":false},{"text":"The length is 2 5/6 because 4 full groups mean 4 × 2/3 = 8/3, and the half-group should be ignored.","correct":false},{"text":"The length is 6 because 4 and 1/2 should be added first and then doubled.","correct":false}]

options: [{"text":"1 7/8 ÷ 3/16 = 10, because the diagram counts groups of size 3/16 in 1 7/8.","correct":true},{"text":"1 7/8 ÷ 16 = 3/16, because partitioning into sixteenths means divide by 16.","correct":false},{"text":"3/16 ÷ 1 7/8 = 2/15, because the bag size should be divided by the total.","correct":false},{"text":"1 7/8 - 3/16 = 1 11/16, because one subtraction gives the number of bags.","correct":false}]
